meta.title: Melanie Kirkpatrick on North Korea for PBS
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow Melanie Kirkpatrick participated in a segment about the conditions in North Korea on PBS. Will human and religious rights in North Korea improve after the death of Kim Jong Il or are they destined to remain the same under the leadership of his son?
